permissions.reason: Spex does not currently manage project-wide OpenCode permission configuration.
permissions.fallback: Retain the host's existing approval and sandbox policy.

progress.reason: No OpenCode-specific progress presenter is provided.
progress.fallback: Emit ordered workflow transitions as concise transcript messages.

subagents.reason: The OpenCode adapter does not declare a supported subagent integration.
subagents.fallback: Run delegated work sequentially in the active validated worktree.
